atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports concerns regarding a suspected genetic syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is a 22-month-old former 34 and 3-week-old twin with Smith-Magenis syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of feeding difficulties, including episodes of apnea during feeding.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been evaluated by an allergist and neurologist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient receives therapies including feeding therapy, occupational therapy, and physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has mild hypotonia of the lower extremities and arms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has autism.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports running around without problems.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's parents report that he is slightly shorter and chunkier.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is shorter and chunkier.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a slightly fussy female, who is shorter and chunkier.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Several organ systems can be affected by this chromosomal deletion syndrome, including congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has reflex abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A geneticist has reported that individuals with this syndrome may experience kidney problems and leg issues, leading to an orthopedics evaluation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with Smith-Magenis syndrome

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with associated physical and neurological manifestations

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a kidney ultrasound

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a kidney ultrasound

atomic_propositions.speaker: nurse
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The nurse will provide instructions and paperwork for the ultrasound

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up with the patient in four weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Inquire about family history of kidney failure, dialysis, or transplant
